192.168.0.1 Interface: eth0 Version: 2 Group: 224.0.0.2 Description: All Routers on this Subnet 192.168.0.15 Interface: eth0 Version: 2 Group: 224.0.0.106 Description: All-Snoopers (rfc4286) 192.168.0.71 Interface: eth0 Version: 2 Group: 224.0.0.251 Description: mDNS (rfc6762) 192.168.0.71 Interface: eth0 Version: 2 Group: 224.0.0.252 Description: Link-local Multicast Name Resolution (rfc4795) 192.168.0.15 Interface: eth0 Version: 2 Group: 239.0.0.250 Description: Organization-Local Scope (rfc2365) 192.168.0.15 Interface: eth0 Version: 2 Group: 239.255.255.250 Description: Organization-Local Scope (rfc2365) Use the newtargets script-arg to add the results as targets

Response 1 of 1: Interface: eth0 IP Offered: 192.168.0.175 Server Identifier: 192.168.0.1 Subnet Mask: 255.255.255.0 Broadcast Address: 192.168.0.255 Router: 192.168.0.1 Domain Name: Home Domain Name Server: 192.168.0.1
targets-asn.asn is a mandatory parameter

Spidering limited to: maxpagecount=40; withinhost=172.67.137.163 Found the following error pages:
Error Code: 403 http://172.67.137.163:80/

VULNERABLE: Slowloris DOS attack State: LIKELY VULNERABLE IDs: CVE:CVE-2007-6750 Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold them open as long as possible. It accomplishes this by opening connections to the target web server and sending a partial request. By doing so, it starves the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.
Disclosure date: 2009-09-17 References: http://ha.ckers.org/slowloris/ https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2007-6750

table.elem: Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold them open as long as possible. It accomplishes this by opening connections to the target web server and sending a partial request. By doing so, it starves the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.

script.output: Tue, 30 Jun 2026 17:28:26 GMT; +58m42s from local time.
128 names had status 400

VULNERABLE: Slowloris DOS attack State: LIKELY VULNERABLE IDs: CVE:CVE-2007-6750 Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold them open as long as possible. It accomplishes this by opening connections to the target web server and sending a partial request. By doing so, it starves the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.
Disclosure date: 2009-09-17 References: http://ha.ckers.org/slowloris/ https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2007-6750

table.elem: Slowloris tries to keep many connections to the target web server open and hold them open as long as possible. It accomplishes this by opening connections to the target web server and sending a partial request. By doing so, it starves the http server's resources causing Denial Of Service.
